markdown:
May contain spoilers from The Fall of Plaguestone **Source** [The Fall of Plaguestone](/Sources.aspx?ID=3) pg. 57 **Base Animal Companion** [Cat](/AnimalCompanions.aspx?ID=4) **Immunities** fire; **Weaknesses** cold 5
**Flaming Attacks** ([fire](/Traits.aspx?ID=72)) The fiery leopard's natural attacks deal 1 fire damage (in addition to the bonus damage dealt to flat-footed targets). This damage increases to 1d4 when the fiery leopard becomes a nimble or savage animal companion.
**Fiery Pelt** ([fire](/Traits.aspx?ID=72)) Creatures that start their turn grappled by the fiery leopard take 1d4 fire damage. Anyone attempting to grapple the fiery leopard takes 1d4 fire damage for each attempt.
**Burning Glow** The fiery leopard sheds dim light in a 10-foot radius which gives it a –2 circumstance penalty on [Stealth](/Skills.aspx?ID=15) checks made at night or in a dark environment.
name: Fiery Leopard

text: Fiery Leopard May contain spoilers from The Fall of Plaguestone Source The Fall of Plaguestone pg. 57 Base Animal Companion Cat Immunities fire; Weaknesses cold 5 Flaming Attacks (fire) The fiery leopard's natural attacks deal 1 fire damage (in addition to the bonus damage dealt to flat-footed targets). This damage increases to 1d4 when the fiery leopard becomes a nimble or savage animal companion. Fiery Pelt (fire) Creatures that start their turn grappled by the fiery leopard take 1d4 fire damage. Anyone attempting to grapple the fiery leopard takes 1d4 fire damage for each attempt. Burning Glow The fiery leopard sheds dim light in a 10-foot radius which gives it a –2 circumstance penalty on Stealth checks made at night or in a dark environment.
